author: Anne Binda
review: I've lived here almost a full year and received a renewal offer increasing my rent about $250, making my rent higher than what they have listed on their website right now for 2 Bed 2.5 Baths. Why would they ask current tenants to pay more than new tenants? Makes zero sense. And no response to my email to try to renogiate.

ownerResponse.text: Hi Anne, thank you for your feedback, and we are sorry that you haven't heard from someone yet! A member of our team will be reaching out to you shortly to address your concerns.

author: caden larson
review:
Went to the leasing office 3 times on different days and nobody was in
Horrible service also dont try calling them because they wont answer or return your calls

ownerResponse.text: Thanks for providing us with this feedback, and we apologize for the communication issues you've experienced. A member of our team will be reaching out to you soon to discuss what we can do to make things right with you and hopefully improve your experience with us.

author: Mongol Rain Pix
review: Went for a tour. Lovely place really. Layout doesnt suit our needs however. And looks like we found something else that fits better for us. Alarming on the parking situation. And the reviews are just horrible of this place. But, the lady

ownerResponse.text: Thanks for your review. We're glad that you had a positive experience with our team!

author: Bridget Wilson
review: My roommate and I came to do a tour after requesting one from Zillow. Got an email from them and they told us to come in whenever. Hours say 10am-5pm. We came multiple times to the leasing office different days at different times between

ownerResponse.text: Hi Bridget, we apologize for the experience you had so far. We appreciate your feedback and will make sure to take the appropriate action to address the communication issues you have experienced. We would love the opportunity to improve your experience and make things right. A member of our team will be reaching out to you soon.

author: Monty Capy
review: Apartments are brand new! Place feels super safe and clean. Management so far has been very good and the overall apartment is a great layout and I never hear my neighbors other than their dog, but thats to be expected. Gym and common area

author: Steve R
review:
Only good thing about this complex is that it is new construction and the interior looks nice.
Parking is an absolute joke, there are 4 unassigned spaces for the entire

author: Brooke Walling
review: Parking situation was horrible. We have a two bedroom apartment and they gave us one parking pass when both my roommate and I have cars and jobs. I have asked multiple times if we can get another pass but they always respond rudely and say

author: James Stearns
review: STEER CLEAR OF THIS TRAP.  First, right away I noticed an alarming number of large carpenter ants (hundreds) in the apartment the first day I showed up when the apartment was clean and vacant.The aren't the type of ants that come when you

author: S Callister
review: As apartment complexes go, very new, nice, and *pet* friendly!  (btw, mgt co does UV tests on carpets & flooring after pet tenants, so non-pet tenants moving in will still get a fresh, clean apartment - no yucky surprises!). Our 2BR apt was

author: Jayson Dougherty
review: Nice apartments. Terrible parking, no visitor parking was just informed that where ppl were able to park they are going to paint it all red. Good luck have guests over. Very expensive place not to be able to have two cars let alone any company!!!!

ownerResponse.text: Hey Jayson - Please rest assured, we completely hear your frustrations. We certainly appreciate your patience as we work together with the owners of this property as well as the COB to solve parking issues at June Road - we are working diligently to find a solution that works for our residents and their guests.
